issue: Difficulty: ❌ EASY - Requires at least HARD for python

agent_report.changes_summary: Hardened repair-express-trivia-worker for the EASY→HARD gate by adding Appendix H rules H-2026-27 (primary max_score_after caps), H-2026-28 (offset_player transfers using applied delta after the cap), and H-2026-29 (deferred correct_ceiling clamping). Updated scoring_standard.md, rulings.json with INC-90–INC-93, solution/replay.py, tests/helpers.py, and tests/test_outputs.py with four new tests plus carol score updates. Bumped Dockerfile platform-revision to r32 and refreshed submission explanations/rubrics.
